home.title: Meeshy - Real-time multilingual messaging
home.description: Chat with the whole world in your own language. Real-time automatic translation for over 100 languages. Join global conversations with no language barrier.

notifications.title: Notifications - Meeshy
notifications.description: Check your Meeshy notifications. Stay informed about new messages, mentions and activity in your multilingual conversations.

settings.title: Settings - Meeshy
settings.description: Customize your Meeshy experience. Manage your language preferences, notifications and privacy settings.

conversations.title: Conversations - Meeshy
conversations.description: Access your real-time multilingual conversations. Chat with your contacts in their native language thanks to automatic translation.

groups.title: Communities - Meeshy
groups.description: Discover and join multilingual communities from around the world. Connect with people who share your interests in their native language.

about.title: About - Meeshy
about.description: Discover Meeshy, the real-time multilingual messaging platform. Our mission: connect the world without language barriers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Meeshy
privacy.description: Read our privacy policy. Learn how Meeshy protects your personal data and respects your privacy.

login.title: Sign in - Meeshy
login.description: Sign in to your Meeshy account and access your real-time multilingual conversations.

terms.title: Terms of Service - Meeshy
terms.description: Read Meeshy's terms of service. Learn the rules and responsibilities when using our multilingual messaging platform.

partners.title: Partners - Meeshy
partners.description: Join the Meeshy partner program. Grow your network and enjoy exclusive benefits by becoming an ambassador of multilingual messaging.

signup.title: Sign up - Meeshy
signup.description: Create your Meeshy account and join the global community of real-time multilingual messaging.

chat.title: Chat - Meeshy
chat.description: Chat in real time with automatic translation. Exchange messages in your native language with no language barrier.

groupDetail.title: Group - Meeshy
groupDetail.description: Join this multilingual group and connect with members from around the world in your native language thanks to automatic translation.

userProfile.title: {name} (@{username}) - Meeshy
userProfile.description: {name}'s profile on Meeshy. Discover this user's conversations and activity.
userProfile.fallbackDescription: Discover this user's profile on Meeshy, the real-time multilingual messaging platform.
userProfile.fallbackOgDescription: Discover profiles and connect with users from around the world on Meeshy.

conversationDetail.title: Conversation {title}
conversationDetail.description: Join this conversation on Meeshy, the real-time multilingual messaging platform.

join.title: Join "{title}" - Meeshy
join.descriptionDefault: {creator} invites you to join "{title}" on Meeshy
join.fallbackDescription: You have been invited to join a conversation on Meeshy, the real-time multilingual messaging platform.
join.fallbackOgDescription: Join real-time multilingual conversations on Meeshy.

affiliate.title: Join Meeshy - Multilingual Messaging
affiliate.description: Discover Meeshy, the messaging platform that breaks language barriers. Communicate in real time with people from around the world, each in their preferred language.
